stemHtml: With regard to temperature, which of the following is correct for the polar climates?

options.a: The mean temperature of the warmest month is 10°C or above, and of the coldest month below minus 3°C.
options.b: The mean temperature of all months is below minus 10°C.
options.c: The mean temperature of all months is below plus 10°C.
options.d: The mean temperature of all months is above 0°C, but temperatures as high as plus 10°C will never be reached.
